rows.label: qev065303_MSG0001
rows.name:
Phew... I can finally take a breath.
Maybe I should look through the paperwork
that has piled up during this time?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Yes, what is it? If you have business
with me, please keep it brief. I want to
use my precious break time productively.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask him what kind of personality he has.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that Lyvia wants to meet him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0003
rows.name:
My profession is B.B. repair... In other
words, the protection of your lives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0004
rows.name:
Therefore, I always try to be
someone worthy of that duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0005
rows.name:
A man who remains calm at all
times and can derive rational
judgments. That is my ideal.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Well, it seems this side of me
is rarely understood by most women,
however. Not that it matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0007
rows.name:
There is a woman who wants to meet
me? Hm, what an unusual person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0008
rows.name:
It wouldn't hurt to go and see such
a rare human being at least once.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0009
rows.name:
I understand. Fortunately, I
still have some break time
left... I will go and see her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0010
rows.name:
Lyvia... is it. She is a
beautiful person. That is a
firm, objective fact. I admit it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0011
rows.name:
However, to think someone like
her would have an interest in
me... Could it be true?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev065303_MSG0012
rows.name:
She is the first woman to ever listen
to my boring stories so happily like
this. Lyvia... She is a good girl.[ST:wait ]
